text: He who, when requested by the plaintiff, does not create an obstruction three, four, or five times, the other party then becomes his debtor. // K_336 //
A gift, a public declaration, causing dissension, and the act of allurement, as well as diverting the mind—these are indeed the causes that serve as proof. // K_337 //
Where any one of these has been established by the plaintiff, the original proof shall be required there, if the plaintiff's claim is established and the defendant denies it. // K_338 //
